calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-16-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-26-2021 Continued To Nov-16-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-24-2021 Continued To Oct-26-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion appeared by zoom for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Ms. Mannion stated that the decedent died in 2007, that this case was referred to her office in 2018, that the decedent died in Washington and that he held a 1/3 interest in real estate in San Francisco. Ms. Mannion also stated that there are two other trusts involved, that the heir is the decedent's brother John, that John is deceased, that there is no estate for John, and that he was unmarried and had no children. In addition, Ms. Mannion stated that John's distribution would be $130,000.00, that it would be a summary probate, and that they would take fees from the same money reducing the amount of the estate and do distribution to the same heirs. Furthermore, Ms. Mannion spoke of various probate codes and stated that this is the best approach she could come up with. The court stated that successors to successors in interest are not allowed to do this, that it is too messy and too tricky, and that the cleaner more appropriate way is to do a new petition. Ms. Mannion stated that she will file an ex parte petition for a summary estate and that she will amend this petition. The First Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is continued to October 26, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-19-2021 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-03-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Continued To Apr-03-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brianna Mannion for the San Francisco Public Administrator's Office (SFPA).

Ms. Mannion stated that the Examiner's notes were sent to an email address that she doesn't use, that the matter was continued to April 3, 2019, and that she was appearing today for the sole purpose of extending the letters (order extending the letters to 4/3/19 was signed in open court). The Court continued the matter to April 3, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy K. Chan. Matter not reported.

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-20-2019 Granted Per Written Order
